description: In Java/JVM, validate the deserialization, reflection access, and JNI/native boundaries where external data crosses in.
body: In Java/JVM, defects cluster at deserialization, reflection access, and JNI/native boundaries, where assumptions about types, ownership, or encoding stop holding. Use when a change crosses public API signatures, checked-exception contracts, and serialVersionUID or consumes data from outside the program. Do not assume the other side honors your contract, and avoid trusting input without checking it. Actions: identify the boundary, test both valid and malformed input, verify the error path, and record the assumptions you are relying on. Validation signals include tests for the failure path, a trace of rejected input, and a documented contract at public API signatures, checked-exception contracts, and serialVersionUID. Risk boundary: escalate when the boundary handles untrusted input, crosses a trust/security line, or feeds a system you cannot roll back.
